member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkManagerTestMethod
member.summary: test Method responsible to manage the Hvqk Test method.

member.summary: Enumerated type for selecting modes.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkManagerTestMethod.HvqkModes.START
member.summary: Start Mode.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkManagerTestMethod.HvqkModes.END
member.summary: End Mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkManagerTestMethod.HvqkMode
member.summary: Gets or sets HvqkMode.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PerStepFlowAction
member.summary: Enumerated type for selecting per flow action.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PerStepFlowAction.CONTINUE
member.summary: Continue action.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PerStepFlowAction.EXIT
member.summary: Exit action.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PerStepFlowAction.FAIL
member.summary: Fail out action.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile
member.summary: This class represents the data structure of the HVQK Config json input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.DomainName
member.summary: Gets or sets Domain_Name value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.InstanceName
member.summary: Gets or sets Instance_Name value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStart
member.summary: Gets or sets Voltage_Start value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStop
member.summary: Gets or sets Voltage_Stop value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.Pin
member.summary: Gets or sets Pin of pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageSteps
member.summary: Gets or sets Voltage Steps list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep
member.summary: This class represents each voltage steps structure contained in the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of the voltage steps.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.AlarmAction
member.summary: Gets or sets Alarm action on per step flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.PlistExecFailAction
member.summary: Gets or sets Plist Exec Fail action on per step flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.Vforce
member.summary: Gets or sets Vforce details list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.VforceDetails
member.summary: This class represents each Vforce structure contained in the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.VforceDetails.ForceValue
member.summary: Gets or sets Force Value of Vforce.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.VforceDetails.PlistOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets Plist Override of Vforce.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.VforceDetails.LevelsBlockDirect
member.summary: Gets or sets Pin of pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkConfigJsonFile.VoltageStep.VforceDetails.TriggerItem
member.summary: Gets or sets TriggerMap.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile
member.summary: This class represents the data structure of the HVQK Metadata json input file.

member.summary: Gets or sets SetPoints list.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.StandardIdOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets standard id override, the prefix of the instance name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.HvqkInstances
member.summary: Gets or sets SetPoints list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.VoltageIndicator
member.summary: This class represents each voltage indicator structure contained in the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.VoltageIndicator.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets voltage indicator name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.VoltageIndicator.VoltageSteps
member.summary: Gets or sets Configuration list.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.HvqkInstance
member.summary: This class represents each voltage indicator structure contained in the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.HvqkInstance.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets voltage indicator name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile.HvqkInstance.InstancesMapping
member.summary: Gets or sets Intances_Mapping list.

member.summary: Interface for extending the Hvqk Test Method.

member.summary: This is the extension for PreStep UC.

member.summary: This is the extension for PrePlist UC.

member.summary: This is the extension for PostPlist UC.

member.summary: This is the extension for PostStep UC.

members.member:
This is the extension for UpdateCaptureFailureTest UC.
/// Containing details of current voltage step.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod
member.summary: Test Method responsible for executing Hvqk test.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.VoltageStepConfigFile
member.summary: Gets or sets of the directory of the HvqkConfigJson file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.HvqkConfigJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the HvqkConfigJsonFile file data contents.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.FuncTest
member.summary: Gets or sets the functional object.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.Patlist
member.summary: Gets or sets Patlist to execute.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.TimingsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets TimingsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.LevelsTc
member.summary: Gets or sets LevelsTc for plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.PowerDownLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets Custom PowerDown Level for post execution flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.PowerUpLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets Custom PowerUp Level for pre execution flow.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.AlarmHandleDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets Alarm Handle Delay time in millisecond.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.DtsConfigurationName
member.summary: Gets or sets The Configuration when DTS processing is needed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.PrimeHvqkTestMethod.GetCurrentVoltageStep
member.summary: Returns the Current Voltage Step.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.IMetadata
member.summary: Provides methods for Hvqk Metadata Populations.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.IMetadata.PopulateMetaDataDataBase(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Populate hvqk metadata database from directory HVQKVars.PATH_TO_METADATA.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult
member.summary: This class represents the data structure of the HVQK Instance Map Results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.DomainResultMap
member.summary: Gets or sets value indicator whether alarm happen.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.DomainResult
member.summary: This class represents the lower data structure of the HVQK Domain Map Results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.DomainResult.DomainStepName
member.summary: Gets or sets waterfall Domain Step Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.DomainResult.InstanceResultMap
member.summary: Gets or sets value indicator whether alarm happen.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.InstanceResult
member.summary: This class represents the lowerest data structure of the HVQK Instance Map Results.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.InstanceResult.VoltageStepName
member.summary: Gets or sets waterfall Voltage Step Name.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.InstanceResult.StepResult
member.summary: Gets or sets waterfall result value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.MapResult.InstanceResult.AlarmOccured
member.summary: Gets or sets value indicator whether alarm happen.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.Metadata.PopulateDataResultsMap(Prime.TestMethods.Hvqk.HvqkMetaDataJsonFile,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function populate the Hvqk DataResults DataBase right after metadata is created.
